sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁה

Transliteration: nâshâh

Phonetic: naw-shaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to forget, deprive
    1. (Qal) to forget
    2. (Niphal) to be forgotten
    3. (Piel) to cause to forget
    4. (Hiphil) to cause to forget, allow to be forgotten

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1428

Part(s) of speech: Verb
